headlines.headline: Calvos Genomics explores strategic alternatives for automated logistics unit

sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives for a business unit introduces uncertainty regarding the company's future structure.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
